footer.tagline: Management and invoicing software designed as a 2nd-year DAW project.

welcome.badgeText: The Castilfac project is now online. Get to know us.
welcome.title: Invoicing software for
welcome.subtitle: Calculate bills of materials, generate quotes instantly and manage your aluminium and PVC workshop from one place. Forget paper and complex spreadsheets.
welcome.sectionSubtitle: Castilfac speaks the language of installers and manufacturers. We built tools to save you hours of manual calculations.
welcome.feature1Desc: Generate professional PDF quotes with your logo, ready to send by email or WhatsApp in one click.
welcome.feature2Desc: Calculate profile cuts, waste, hardware and glass square metres to know your exact real cost.
welcome.feature3Desc: Keep track of all your materials. Never run out of profiles mid-project again.

pricing.title: One plan, full power
pricing.subtitle: No complications or fine print. Access all Castilfac tools with a flat monthly rate for your workshop.
pricing.planDesc: Complete invoicing, bill of materials and CRM software for metal carpentry.
pricing.feat5: Multiple users for the same workshop
pricing.ctaNote: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

feature.title: All the power of
feature.subtitle: It is not just invoicing software. It is a full ERP built from scratch to solve real day-to-day problems in a metal carpentry workshop.
feature.block1Desc: The heart of Castilfac. Forget manually calculating cuts and waste for every window.
feature.block1Item1: Automatic calculation of Aluminium and PVC profiles.
feature.block1Item3: Automatic inclusion of hardware and accessories.
feature.block1Item4: Waste estimation to adjust real cost.
feature.block2Desc: Turn your bills of materials into professional quotes in seconds and convert them to invoices in one click.
feature.block2Item1: Instant PDF generation with your logo.
feature.block3Desc: Keep your workshop organised. Castilfac automatically deducts material from inventory when you accept a quote.
feature.block3Item4: Categorisation by series, colours and finishes.
feature.block4Desc: Keep all your client data, job site addresses and work history at hand.
feature.block4Item2: Separation between billing and installation addresses.
feature.block4Item4: Quick search by name, ID or phone.

about.title: About Us: The engine behind
about.p1: Castilfac was born as an ambitious 2nd-year DAW project with a clear goal: revolutionise and simplify management in metal, aluminium and PVC carpentry workshops. We know that calculating cuts, waste and accurate quotes is complex work that needs specialised tools.
about.p2: That is why we designed a modern, fast web app tailored to real industry needs, leaving behind obsolete and hard-to-use software.
about.missionDesc: Digitise workshops with invoicing software that speaks their language: bills of materials, profile cuts and glass square metres.
about.academicDesc: This system is the result of months of effort, design and continuous learning in the Web Application Development higher cycle.
about.techDesc: Built with cutting-edge tools: Angular 19 for the frontend, Node.js for the backend and Tailwind CSS for a fully responsive design.
about.ctaDesc: Check out the plans or write to us: handmade by a DAW student, open to suggestions.

company.heroSubtitle: Transforming metal carpentry workshop management through technology and innovation.
company.missionP1: CastilFac was created with a clear goal: digitise and optimise the workflow of aluminium and glass professionals. Historically, creating quotes and material breakdowns has been a manual, slow process prone to calculation errors that cost workshops money.
company.missionP2: This SaaS platform centralises clients, pricing and complex mathematical calculations in a clean, intuitive interface, letting workshops focus on what they do best: manufacturing and installing.
company.originP1: This software was fully developed as a Final Degree Project (TFG) for the Higher Cycle in Multiplatform Application Development (2DAM).
company.frontendDesc: Reactive, fast and modular user interface (SPA), designed for the best experience on any device.
company.backendDesc: Robust server managing business logic, quote calculation and security via JWT tokens and CORS.
company.dbDesc: Multi-tenant architecture structured to guarantee isolation and privacy of each registered workshop's data.

team.title: The team behind CastilFac
team.subtitle: Built with passion to revolutionise aluminium and glazing workshop management.
team.photoAlt: Photo of Pablo Manuel Del Castillo López
team.name: Pablo M. Del Castillo
team.bio: I am 20 years old and a 2DAM student at IES Trassierra (Córdoba). I created CastilFac as my final project to make daily life easier for metal industry professionals with intuitive, fast and secure software.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: In compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Organic Law 3/2018 on Personal Data Protection (LOPDGDD), we inform you that personal data collected through the CastilFac platform will be processed by the software owner (hereinafter, "the Controller").
privacy.s2Intro: For proper provision of the SaaS service, CastilFac strictly collects the following data:
privacy.s2Item1Desc: Trade name, tax ID, postal address and billing details.
privacy.s2Item2Desc: Name, email and password (stored using irreversible bcrypt encryption).
privacy.s2Item3Desc: Access and activity logs on the platform for security and technical audit purposes.
privacy.s3Intro: Your data will be used solely and exclusively for the following purposes:
privacy.s3Item1: Creation and management of your platform access account.
privacy.s3Item2: Provision of the software service (quote creation, catalogue management).
privacy.s3Item3: Administrative, accounting and tax management (subscription billing).
privacy.s3Item4: Sending technical communications or security notices about the software.
privacy.s3Note: CastilFac will NOT sell, rent or transfer your client database or price lists to third parties under any circumstances.
privacy.s4Text: Regarding end client data of the workshop (individuals or companies the workshop quotes for), CastilFac acts solely as Data Processor, limiting itself to storing such information on its servers so the software can function. The Workshop is the sole Data Controller of such data and must ensure it has lawful consent from its clients to enter them into our system.
privacy.s5Text: Data will be retained while the commercial relationship continues (active subscription). If you cancel or delete items within the app (clients, invoices), CastilFac uses soft delete techniques to preserve historical data integrity and avoid breaks in accounting records. If you request full account deletion, data will be blocked and subsequently destroyed, except where we must retain it by legal requirement (e.g. billing data for 5 years).
privacy.s6Intro: As a user, you may exercise your rights at any time:
privacy.s6Item1: Know what data we hold about you.
privacy.s6Item2: Correct inaccurate data (available directly from your settings panel).
privacy.s6Item4: Request a structured export file of your data.
privacy.s6Contact: To exercise these rights, write to us at privacidad@castilfac.com.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terms.s1Text: By registering and using CastilFac software (hereinafter, "the Service"), provided as Software as a Service (SaaS), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you must not use the Service. Use of CastilFac is restricted exclusively to professionals and businesses (B2B).
terms.s2Text: CastilFac provides a cloud platform for comprehensive management of metal and aluminium carpentry workshops, including among others quote preparation, material breakdown and workshop order status tracking. System updates and improvements will be applied automatically to all users with an active subscription.
terms.s3Item1: Access to the Service requires an active subscription. Payment will be made in advance according to the agreed billing cycle.
terms.s3Item2: In case of non-payment or subscription expiry, CastilFac reserves the right to temporarily suspend account access. During this period, client data will not be deleted (it will remain in "soft delete" or "inactive" state) and may be recovered after payment is regularised.
terms.s4Text: All source code, design, master material databases and calculation algorithms are the exclusive property of CastilFac. On the other hand, the Client is the sole owner and responsible for data entered into the system (client portfolio, issued quotes, commercial margins and custom sale prices).
terms.s5Intro: In compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in force in Spain and the European Union:
terms.s5Item1: CastilFac acts as Data Processor of the workshop's clients' personal data.
terms.s5Item2: The Workshop (User) acts as Data Controller and must have consent from its own clients to enter their data (name, address, phone) on our platform for quote generation.
terms.s5Item3: CastilFac guarantees that passwords are stored using secure encryption algorithms (bcrypt) and will not share one workshop's client database with third parties.
terms.s6Text: CastilFac is a calculation assistance tool. The Client is ultimately responsible for reviewing and approving quotes before sending them to buyers. CastilFac is not liable for economic losses, lost profit or damages arising from calculation errors, incorrect waste configuration, outdated base prices or misuse of templates by the user.
terms.s7Text: The client may request account cancellation at any time. Upon cancellation, CastilFac will offer the possibility to export client data before permanent deletion from servers, guaranteeing the right to be forgotten.
terms.footerNote: Legal questions? Contact us at legal@castilfac.com
